ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who created the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who last updated the model */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "model_family" TEXT /* Model family (e.g., CNN, RNN) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Model type (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the model */,
  "run_method" TEXT /* Method used to run the model (e.g., fit_one_cycle) */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used during the run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "gpu_used" INTEGER /* Whether a GPU was used */,
  "gpu_memory" INTEGER /* GPU memory used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who created the run */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the task */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the run */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the task */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy achieved in this run */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision achieved in this run */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall achieved in this run */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score achieved in this run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this model version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log for this model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the run */,
  "average_accuracy" REAL /* Average accuracy across tasks for this run */,
  "best_task_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the best performing task */,
  "average_precision" REAL /* Average precision across tasks for this run */,
  "average_recall" REAL /* Average recall across tasks for this run */,
  "average_f1_score" REAL /* Average F1 score across tasks for this run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_best_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("best_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the run */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the model parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the model parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)
